prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap of furan was calculated using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory with density fitting enabled in PySCF, in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The geometry was taken as-is from the provided XYZ file at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz and not re-optimized before the single-point calculation. The SCF converged fully in 9 iterations. The calculated HOMO–LUMO gap is 6.2573602 eV.
